creator: keichii@iteration.net
text:
The author of the application released a new patchset.
This patchset fixes several bugs and introduces many good features.

Fix: Either use the following patch or fetch from
ftp://xcin.linux.org.tw/pub/xcin/xcin/patch/xcin-2.5.2.pre5.diff3.gz

==================begin diff======================
How-To-Repeat: 
Put the patch into ports/chinese/xcin25/patches/patch-a?
